title: Test verifies description names the offending field — prevents description regression
description: The tests assert description.contains('position') and description.contains('limit'), not just that the error type is invalidArguments. This is the right oracle — a future change that removes the description (e.g. switching back to method_error) would fail the test immediately. A contributor might suggest weakening these assertions to just check the type; resist this, the description is part of the user-facing contract.
